name: Shirou Kuramori
description:
Shirou Kuramori is a Private Detective who is hired by [Reiko Tamura](https://anilist.co/character/16586/) to spy on [Shinichi Izumi](https://anilist.co/character/12323/).

~!After becoming a liability, he is targeted and his family killed by parasites.!~

(Source: Kiseijuu Fandom)
